name: Third party caused my ladder fall at work site, sue them?
description: Yes, sue for more $—comp + PI common.

mainEntity.name: Third party caused my ladder fall at work site, sue them?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, sue for more $—comp + PI common.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Yes, file personal injury suit** alongside comp for pain/suffering/punitive extras.[2][3]

Comp lien on settlement.

- GC, ladder supplier liable if negligent.
- No comp offset.

Coordination key—lawyer manages.
